name: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Ameris Mc Renta Industrial Fondo De Inversion
summary: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. - Ameris Mc Renta Industrial Fondo De Inversion invests in industrial real estate. Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. manages the fund. The fund aims to generate returns through investments in a diversified portfolio of industrial properties.
